title: Founder Associate (FinCrime & Fraud)
must_haves: Analytical mindset and strong program-management skills
Passion for AI automation; experience building automations/internal tools/agent workflows valued
Fintech risk / payments / fraud-FinCrime exposure explicitly NOT required
met_strengths: Builds AI agents with Claude Code (directly matches the 'agent workflows / AI-first' framing)
one_line_verdict: Open and notably does NOT require fintech/FinCrime background while explicitly rewarding AI-agent-building - Ryan's strongest of the gated-domain roles, but it is a risk/ops-infrastructure mandate (fintech context, program-management heavy) rather than community-led GTM, so a genuine stretch.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby + StudySmarter/SimplyHired mirrors. Apron = payments fintech (founded 2021, ~100 staff, $50m raised, Index/Bessemer/Tony Fadell). Role owns FinCrime/fraud infrastructure; predicted EUR60-80k. AI-automation valued, domain exp not required.
